internal_issues.description: WIN-049 tidal force at equator was stated as 0.6% but computed value is 1.48%. Curmudgeon Cycle 2 identified the error.

recommended_actions.action: Apply ISS-454 one-line fix in generate-html.js (~line 1777): change 'if (SECTIONS_AVAILABLE) { const sections = loadSectionsCache();' to 'const sections = loadSectionsCache(); if (sections) {'. This is CRITICAL — sections.json is never injected into HTML until this is fixed. All 11 sections.json prose improvements are invisible to readers.
Apply EXP-011 (tab ordering in generate-html.js). 6 generate-html.js edits needed. Requires human. Expansion output at monitor/analyst/expansions/EXP-011-tab-ordering.json.
